name: Kelly 32 leather handbag
description:
Hermès Kelly 32 Toile Canvas Leather Ivory Indigo Silk Twilly Scarf Top Handbag. This structured silhouette is one of the most sought-after designs in luxury fashion—classic, elegant, and endlessly wearable.

✨ Now styled with an authentic Hermès silk twilly scarf, wrapped around the handle for added personality, protection, and that signature high-fashion finish.

The twilly not only enhances the aesthetic but also helps preserve the handle—making this piece both beautiful and functional.

Details:
	•	Size: 32 (ideal medium size)
	•	Material: Toile canvas with leather trim
	•	Color: Ivory x Indigo
	•	Style: Structured top handle satchel
	•	Closure: Signature Hermès turn-lock closure
	•	Made in France

Includes:
	•	Hermès Kelly 32 bag
	•	Authentic Hermès silk twilly scarf (100% silk, Made in France)

Why you’ll love it:
	•	Iconic Hermès Kelly design (collector   investment piece)
	•	Rare and elegant neutral color combination
	•	Twilly adds a chic, customizable luxury touch
	•	Protects handle while elevating overall look
	•	Perfect for work, events, or elevated everyday styling
• No sign of flaws noted. Comes from smoke free home.


Estimated item measurements
Handle Drop: 3.75"
Height: 9.5"
Width: 12.5"
Depth: 4.5"
Size: 32cm
